extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primoz outsprinted EVENEPOEL Remco in final 50m of summit finish after marking every move, extending GC lead to 10 seconds with bonifications
tactical_patterns: ROGLIC positioned inside of every corner in final kilometer to psychologically pressure EVENEPOEL and control sprint launch timing.
Soudal-Quick-Step attempted valley flats fatigue strategy pre-climb but UAE took over pacing to protect GC riders from attrition.
ALMEIDA João attacked with sub-1km remaining forcing EVENEPOEL to instinctively chase, burning matches before ROGLIC's final sprint.
SOLER Marc waited for teammate ALMEIDA on climb in home region, sacrificing personal result for UAE podium defense.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: launched sprint at 300m but lacked full conviction after being shadowed on every corner by Roglic's positional tactics
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: gained 6 seconds in final 50m sprint after summit finish, demonstrating explosive finishing power rarely seen from stage race GC riders
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: positive: bridged solo to lead group then attacked sub-1km, showing podium-caliber legs despite sacrificing for Soler earlier
rider_signals.CHICONE Antonio: negative: struggled to hold group on climb, dropped to 8th GC after being prominent early race, revealing form regression
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: nursed Almeida back to leaders group in critical GC moment, showing domestique commitment over personal ambitions
